expected_trades_per_day_basis: OI_Price channel typically fires ~60 events/day across all symbols; intersecting taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.65 (~25% of bursts), liquidity_bucket=high (~30% of symbols), and oi_change_pct>=10 (~40% of OI bursts) yields ~60*0.25*0.30*0.40 ≈ 1.8/day, rounded to 2.0.

best_in: BTC trending up with rising aggregate OI
mid-cap alt rotation days where taker buy dominance persists >5min
funding rate near zero or slightly negative on the symbol
worst_in: BTC chop / range-bound days where OI pumps fade within 60s
high-funding (>0.05%/8h) regimes where longs are already crowded
post-CPI / FOMC liquidation cascades where high-liq names whipsaw
regime_sensitivity.explanation: This is a momentum-continuation long on aggressive OI buildup — it needs follow-through, which only materializes when the broader tape supports longs and shorts are not already trapped. In chop or crowded-long regimes, the OI pump itself marks the local top and the high-liq filter ironically gives the best fills for adverse fills.

live_readiness_caveats: E126-family asymmetric TP/SL geometry (TP=0.51%, SL=6.00%, 80% win) is fragile: a single 6% loss erases ~12 winners. Synthesizer flagged this — enforce SL<=2.5x TP in the GPU sweep and reject configs where kelly_capped or p25_capped_tail is negative even when mean is positive.

High-liquidity bucket means competing with HFT on entry; expect 3-8 bps slippage on market-in and partial fills on limit-in within the OI burst window. Latency >2s from BWE message to order will materially erode edge given the 5min taker-buy-ratio lookback already lags the move.

OI_Price channel has 61 archetypes registered but ZERO in top-10 — this is either a real channel-quality gap or a feature-encoding gap. Treat the first 100 paper trades as channel validation, not archetype validation; do not scale size until OI_Price proves it can produce ANY positive archetype in paper.

monitoring_metrics.metric: live median trade % vs backtest median (0.217%)
monitoring_metrics.alert_threshold: live median <50% of backtest median over rolling 30 trades
monitoring_metrics.rationale: E126 paper-shadow showed +0.3946 backtest compounding to -13.5% live — the asymmetric geometry hides left-tail in the median. Tracking median delta is the earliest signal that the trap is materializing.

monitoring_metrics.alert_threshold: >3 consecutive losses OR cumulative drawdown >12% within any 20-trade window
monitoring_metrics.rationale: With 80% modeled win rate and 6% SL, the geometric expectation of 3 consecutive losses is ~0.8% probability — observing it means the win rate has decayed below ~63%, which inverts kelly_capped.

monitoring_metrics.metric: fill rate on TP=0.51% limit exits
monitoring_metrics.alert_threshold: <70% of expected TP touches actually fill
monitoring_metrics.rationale: On high-liq pumps, the 0.51% TP often prints but doesn't fill the full size due to queue position; missed TPs convert to time/SL exits which is the catastrophic path for this geometry.

Below 1/day means the triple-filter is over-restrictive and stats won't accumulate; above 4/day means either OI_Price firing has structurally shifted or one of the thresholds is being mis-applied — both invalidate the backtest baseline.

monitoring_metrics.metric: taker_buy_ratio_5m at fill time vs at signal time
monitoring_metrics.alert_threshold: ratio drops >0.10 between signal and fill
monitoring_metrics.rationale: This archetype's edge is conditioned on persistent taker buy dominance; if it decays during the 5min lookback-to-fill window, the entry is into a fading move and SL probability spikes.

stop_trading_triggers.condition: 7-day rolling Sharpe < 0 OR 7-day P&L below -8% on this archetype's allocation
stop_trading_triggers.rationale: Given $1000 capital and 5-10% sizing, -8% on the strategy's slice means ~3 max-SL events compounded — well beyond the backtest's worst observable run, indicating the edge has flipped or the asymmetric geometry has detonated.

stop_trading_triggers.condition: win rate over trailing 25 trades drops below 65%
stop_trading_triggers.rationale: Backtest implies 80% win rate; below 65% with TP=0.51%/SL=6.00% gives negative expectancy under any sane kelly_capped — the trap has materialized and additional trades only deepen the hole.

stop_trading_triggers.condition: two consecutive 6% SL hits within the same UTC day
stop_trading_triggers.rationale: This is a 0.04^2 = 0.16% event under the backtest distribution; observing it means the conditional independence assumption between OI bursts has broken (likely correlated alt liquidations) and the archetype's risk model no longer applies.

expected_max_dd_basis: E126 (parent template) compounded to -13.5% on $1000 paper despite +0.3946 backtest score; porting to OI_Price channel where no archetype has yet ranked top-10 should be assumed at-least-as-bad until proven otherwise, so 14% is the floor expectation over a 30-day paper window with 5-10% sizing.
compare_to_existing: E126 pc_pump_taker_buy_extreme_long — same taker-buy-extreme + long template, same asymmetric TP/SL family, just ported from pricechange to OI_Price channel. E126's paper-shadow result (+0.3946 backtest → -13.5% live) is the direct triangulation point and the strongest prior on what to expect.
